name: Vegetable Pie with Peppers (Quiche)
recipeIngredient: 1 cup shredded cheese (1/2 Cheddar and 1/2 Jack)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit. Lightly grease a pie plate or quiche dish.
2. Cook the vegetables in salted water until almost tender, then drain.
3. Place the cooked vegetables and cheese in the pie plate.
4. Beat or blend the remaining ingredients together and pour into the pie plate or quiche dish.
5. Bake for 35 to 40 minutes, or until a knife inserted halfway between the center and edge comes out clean.
6. Let stand for 5 minutes before cutting. Serves 6.
Substitute: One package of 10 ounce frozen chopped broccoli or cauliflower (thawed and drained), or the frozen California mix can be substituted for vegetables. Any variation of vegetables works well.
